sector_summary: The Technology sector (XLK) shows strong relative strength despite medium confidence. Financials (XLF), Energy (XLE), Consumer Staples (XLP), and Real Estate (XLRE) all exhibit conflicts between price momentum and news flow, indicating potential caution. Overall, the macro context favors defensive themes and sectors with stable returns.
